title: Improved Wool
description: 16x Outlined wool overlay, uses softer colors than modern wool while still more visible than default 1.8.9
body:
Wool overlay with clear outlines and custom colors! Intended for 1.8.9

![A screenshot of every minecraft wool block on a black background, with modified textures to be outlined and in alternate colors.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tYbS7Bw4/images/a49701cb754be09e21ca564f939303458335377c.png)
